UI_trait_AdrenalineJunkieDesc:
当高度恐慌时移动会更快
(强烈恐慌 +0.2 基本速度
极度恐慌 +0.25 基本速度)
UI_trait_bravedesc:
不易恐慌
(恐慌 -70%,除了夜惊和恐惧症)
UI_trait_NightVisionDesc:
晚上视力更好
(夜间环境亮度 +20%)
UI_trait_DexterousDesc:
快速转移库存物品
(库存转移时间 -50%)
UI_trait_eagleeyeddesc:
具有更快能见度衰减和更宽能见度弧度范围
(更宽的视野)
UI_trait_FastHealerDesc:
从受伤和疾病中恢复得更快
(减轻受伤的严重程度,不适用于运动疲劳)
UI_trait_FastLearnerDesc:
可以获得更多经验
(所有获取技能经验 +30%,体格和力量除外)
UI_trait_FastReaderDesc:
花更少的时间看书
(阅读速度 +30%)
UI_trait_gracefuldesc:
移动时噪音较小
(脚步声半径 -40%
跑步/冲刺跨越低栅栏或被猛扑僵尸绊倒的几率 -10%)
UI_trait_InconspicuousDesc:
不太可能被僵尸被发现
(被僵尸发现的几率 -50%)
UI_trait_IronGutDesc:
患食物中毒的机会较少
(食物中毒几率 -50%,食物中毒持续时间更短)
UI_trait_keenhearingdesc:
更大的感知半径
(感知半径 +100%
僵尸从后面靠近会更早地被看见)
UI_trait_lighteaterdesc:
需要经常少吃
(饥饿速度 -25%)
UI_trait_luckydesc:
有时候事情会如你所愿
(稀有战利品几率 +10%)
UI_trait_PackmuleDesc:
增加容器库存容量
(容量 +30%,包括汽车座椅)
UI_trait_outdoorsmandesc:
不受恶劣天气条件影响
感冒几率 -90%
穿过树木时被划伤/撕裂几率 -99%
使用钻孔木板更快地点燃营火.
UI_trait_resilientdesc:
不易患病,僵尸化速度较慢
(僵尸化速度 -25%,感冒几率 -55%,
寒冷强度 -20%,降温速度 -50%)
UI_trait_SpeedDemonDesc:
快速驾驶者
(换挡速度 +100%,
所有车辆最高速度 +15%,
倒车时引擎响声 +200%)
UI_trait_thickskinneddesc:
划痕或咬破皮肤的可能性较小
(受伤几率 -30%)
UI_trait_LessSleepDesc:
需要较少的睡眠
(睡眠需求 -30%)
UI_trait_FishingDesc: (知道如何制作和修理钓鱼竿)
UI_trait_GardenerDesc: (知道如何制作除粉喷雾和除虫喷雾来治疗植物病害)
UI_trait_handydesc:
建造更快、建筑强度更强
(所有建筑除了墙壁 +100 HP,建造速度增加)
UI_trait_HerbalistDesc:
可以找到草药,并用来制作药物和膏药
还可以识别有毒的野生食物.
UI_trait_HikerDesc: 知道如何制作尖刺陷阱、套索陷阱和陷阱箱.
UI_trait_nutritionistdesc:
可以看到任何食物的营养价值
(包括非包装食品和熟食)
UI_trait_AllThumbsDesc:
缓慢转移库存物品
(库存转移时间 +300%)
UI_trait_AsthmaticDesc:
耐力消耗更快
(跑步或短跑时耐力下降 +100%
挥舞武器时耐力下降 +30%)
UI_trait_clumsydesc:
移动时发出更多噪音
(脚步声半径 +20%,
跑步/冲刺跨越低栅栏或被猛扑僵尸绊倒的几率 +10%)
UI_trait_ConspicuousDesc:
更容易被僵尸发现
(被僵尸发现的几率 +100%)
UI_trait_cowardlydesc:
特别容易恐慌
(恐慌 +100%,除了夜惊和恐惧症)
UI_trait_deafdesc:
非常小的感知半径和听力范围
(听不到声音.收音机的唠叨听不到
由于隐藏式字幕,仍然可以看电视)
UI_trait_DisorganizedDesc:
减少容器库存容量
(容量 -30%,包括汽车座椅)
UI_trait_hardheardesc:
较小的感知半径和听力范围
(一些音效会被消音)
UI_trait_heartyappetitedesc:
需要更规律地进食
(饥饿速度 +50%)
UI_trait_HighThirstDesc:
需要更多的水才能生存
(口渴速度 +100%)
UI_trait_PacifistDesc:
不擅于使用武器
(所有武器技能、维护和瞄准技能获取经验 -25%)
UI_trait_pronetoillnessdesc:
更容易患病,僵尸化速度更快
僵尸化速度 +25%,感冒几率 +70%,
寒冷强度 +20%,降温速度 +50%
UI_trait_InsomniacDesc:
睡觉时疲劳感下降减慢
(睡眠时间减少,睡眠时疲劳感下降更慢)
UI_trait_shortsighdesc: 视距小,能见度衰减更慢
UI_trait_MoreSleepDesc:
需要更多的睡眠
(疲劳恢复效率 -30%)
UI_trait_SlowHealerDesc:
从受伤和疾病中恢复更慢
(受伤的严重程度增加,不适用于运动疲劳)
UI_trait_SlowLearnerDesc:
获得的经验值更少
(所有获取技能经验 -30%,体格和力量不适用)
UI_trait_SlowReaderDesc:
阅读书籍的时间更长
(阅读速度 -30%)
UI_trait_SundayDriverDesc:
开非常慢的司机
加速度 -40%,最大速度为 30 MPH
引擎响声没有变化.
UI_trait_ThinSkinnedDesc:
增加划伤、撕裂或咬破皮肤的几率
(受伤几率增加)
UI_trait_unluckydesc:
对你来说可能不好的事情,经常会发生
(稀有战利品几率 -10%)
UI_trait_WeakStomachDesc:
患食物中毒的几率更高
(食物中毒几率 +100%)
UI_trait_veryunderweightdesc:
非常低力量,非常低耐力和容易受伤
(初始体重为 60
当体重低于 50 时转换为 '瘦骨嶙峋'
当体重超过 65 时转换为 '体重过轻'
近战伤害 -40%)
UI_trait_underweightdesc:
低力量,低耐力和容易受伤
初始体重为 70
(当体重低于 65 时转换为 '身形消瘦'
在体重高于 75 时失去此特性
近战伤害 -20%)
UI_trait_obesedesc:
跑步速度降低,非常低耐力和容易受伤
初始体重为 105
(当体重低于 100 时转换为 '体重过重')
UI_trait_overweightdesc:
跑步速度降低,非常低耐力和容易受伤
初始体重为 95
(当体重高于 100 时转换为 '身肥体胖'
在体重低于 85 时失去此特性)
UI_trait_unfitdesc:
非常低耐力,耐力恢复非常低
(透过健身提升体格到 3 级转换为 '身体不好'
此特性在体格低于 3 时会获得)
UI_trait_outofshapedesc:
低耐力,耐力恢复低
(透过健身提升体格到 5 级来失去此特性
体格低于 3 级的时候会转换为 '身体很差'
此特性在体格低于 5 时会获得)
UI_trait_feebledesc:
减少近战武器的击退效果,减少负重
(透过健身提升力量到 5 级来失去此特性
此特性在力量低于 5 时会获得)
UI_trait_weakdesc:
减少近战武器的击退效果,减少负重
(近战伤害 -40%
透过健身提升力量到 2 级转换为 '身体虚弱'
此特性在力量低于 2 时会获得)
UI_trait_athleticdesc:
更快的跑步速度,可以跑更长时间而不累
(跑步或冲刺时的耐力消耗 -60%
此特性在体格 9 时会获得
此特性在体格低于 9 时失去)
UI_trait_fitdesc:
身体健康
(此特性在体格 6 时会获得
透过健身提升体格到 9 级转换为 '运动健将'
此特性在体格低于 6 时失去)
UI_trait_stoutdesc:
近战武器拥有额外的击退效果,增加负重
(此特性在力量 6 时会获得
透过健身提升力量到 9 级转换为 '身强力壮'
此特性在力量低于 6 时失去)
UI_trait_strongdesc:
近战武器拥有额外的击退效果,增加负重
(近战伤害 +40%
此特性在力量 9 时会获得
此特性在力量低于 9 时失去)
UI_trait_axemandesc:
更擅于砍树,更快挥动斧头
(对树木和僵尸攻速 +25%)
UI_trait_nightowldesc:
需要很少的睡眠,睡觉时保持高度警戒
(但完全筋疲力尽时还是会入睡)
UI_profdesc_parkranger:
允许在森林和林地中更快移动
了解所有陷阱配方
UI_profdesc_chef: 了解如何制作蛋糕面糊,馅饼面团和面包面团
UI_profdesc_farmer: 了解如何制作除粉喷雾和除虫喷雾来治疗植物病害
UI_profdesc_fisherman: 了解如何制作和修理鱼竿,如何收线,以及如何制作渔网
UI_profdesc_electrician:
可以操作发电机
了解如何制作遥控器、触发器和定时器
了解如何制作自制收音机,自制无线电台和自制对讲机
UI_profdesc_engineer:
可以制作陷阱和炸弹
了解如何制作气溶胶胶弹,火焰油弹,土制炸弹,烟雾弹和噪音发生器
UI_profdesc_metalworker:
可以焊接搜寻的金属来打造物品和路障
了解所有金属加工配方
UI_ShortSighted_Condition: 戴眼镜可以消除视力障碍

UI_trait_moredesc_soto_alcoholic: Alcohol addiction with staged withdrawal; can become Former Alcoholic.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_allergic: Random sneeze attracts zombies; muffled with tissue/toilet paper.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_allthumbs_rework: [SOTO] -50% transfer speed; cannot craft while walking.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_animalfriend_fora: 搜索模式： +3% Animals and Berries.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_athletic_rework: [SOTO] Athletic grants +4 Fitness XP (was +2 in vanilla).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_botanist: Farming +1, Foraging +2; Herbalist + Advanced Foraging; all crop seasons.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_brawler_rework: [SOTO] Melee hits may reduce unhappiness; improvised weapon recipes.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_breakintechnique: Axes deal +50% damage to doors and barricades.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_breathingtechniqu: Endurance regen while standing still; x3 while sitting/in vehicle.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_calmminded: Stress capped at 50%; faster stress/panic decay.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_chronicmigraine: Migraine cycles: 4–48h active, 24–72h cooldown; head pain 8–16.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_commercialdriver: -fatigue gain while driving; can repair heavy vehicles.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_cruelty: +25% XP for weapon skills, Maintenance and Aiming on kill.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_culinary_note: Replaces vanilla Cook trait pick; grants cooking recipes.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_cutter_chop: Bonus Axe XP when chopping trees (scales with tree damage).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_cuttingtools: +20% XP for Axe/Short Blade/Long Blade (main hand only).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_dancer: Fitness +1, Lightfoot +2, Nimble +2; Graceful + Gymnast traits.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_deliveryman: Nimble +1, Sprinting +2, Organized; fast courier build.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_depressive: Passive unhappiness; random 60-min episodes; -3–10% XP when unhappy.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_desensitized2: Selectable Desensitized (8 pts); profession version is free.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_detective: Sneak/Aim/Reload/Foraging/Tracking +1; Advanced Foraging; Hollow Book recipe.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_dexterous_rework: [SOTO] +50% transfer speed, faster weapon draw, faster rope climb.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_earnable_sneak: Earnable at Sneak 4–5+ if Conspicuous absent (SOTO sandbox).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_entomologist_fora: 搜索模式： +35% Insects and Fish Bait.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_expshooter_xp: +2 Aiming and +2 Reloading XP at character creation.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_fastmeta_2: +30% calorie burn when weight >70; +30% Fitness XP, -30% Strength XP.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_fearofthedark: Panic/stress in darkness (light <=36%); blocks Night Vision.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_forager_forage: 搜索模式： +0.5 vision radius, +3% all categories.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_formeralcoholic: Drinking may relapse into Alcoholic; chance decays daily.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_formersmoker: Tobacco may relapse into Smoker; chance decays daily.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_generatorexpert: Generator repair: +5% extra condition; +5 Electrical XP.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_grants_fastmeta: Grants hidden SOTO Fast Metabolism trait.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_grants_slowmeta: Grants hidden SOTO Slow Metabolism trait.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_gravedigger: Strength +1, Blunt +1, Maintenance +1; Accustomed to Smell.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_hemophobic_rework: [SOTO] Cannot treat others; stress from blood on self.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_highsweaty: Extra wetness/thirst in combat, running, sprinting and panic.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_hiker_rework: [SOTO] Walking 10+ min reduces hunger/thirst/fatigue; trap recipes.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_huntsman: Hunter skills + Tracking +2; Hunter trait + Improved Foraging.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_junkyardworker: Mechanics/Metalwelding/Blacksmith +1; Advanced Foraging; scrap forge recipes.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_lesssweaty: Reduces wetness gain; less effective in heavy rain.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_lifelonglearner: No boredom while reading skill books.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_liquidblood: Bleeding deals ~100% more damage (0.0057 HP/tick per part).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_loader: Strength +2, Nimble +1, Strong Back; heavy lifter.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_marathonrunner: Endurance regen while running/sprinting (scales with Fitness, reduced if overweight/obese).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_new: [SOTO] 新特质 — 原版游戏中没有。
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_obese_rework: [SOTO] Start weight 105; new description with Slow Metabolism.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_obese_wetness: +40% wetness gain from activity (SOTO; not in trait tooltip).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_optimistic: Boredom -50%; unhappiness capped at 49 for 48h after depression timer.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_overweight_rework: [SOTO] Start weight 95; new description with Slow Metabolism.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_pacifist_rework: [SOTO] -25% combat XP; removable via sandbox over time.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_panicattacks: Sudden panic attacks; frequency drops with survival time; may wake from sleep.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_prof_soto: [SOTO] 新职业 — 原版游戏中没有。
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_pronetoillness_re: [SOTO] Chance to catch cold outdoors; faster zombification.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_refueller: -25% inventory transfer, refuel and siphon time; stacks with Dextrous.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_sensitivedigestio: Overeating causes discomfort, pain and nausea; scales with fullness.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_shooter_xp: +1 Aiming and +1 Reloading XP at character creation.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_slack_1: Grants Strength -1 and Fitness -1 at character creation.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_slack_2: Trait removed after spawn — only XP penalty remains.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_slowmeta_2: -30% calorie burn when weight <90; +30% Strength XP, -30% Fitness XP.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_smoker_rework: [SOTO] Reworked: cough when low endurance, hunger swings, swing endurance loss.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_soldier: Combat skills package; Night Owl; Improved Foraging.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_strong_rework: [SOTO] Strong now grants +4 Strength XP (was +2 in vanilla).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_strongback: Base carry weight 9 (vanilla 8); faster torso muscle recovery.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_stronggrip: Heavy attacks use base endurance cost; can attack at 0 endurance.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_stronggrip2_note: Profession trait — may not apply if stronggrip not granted at spawn.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_adrenalineju: At spawn becomes vanilla Adrenaline Junkie.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_animalfriend: At spawn becomes vanilla Animal Friend.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_breathingtec: At spawn becomes SOTO Breathing Technique.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_eagleeyed: At spawn becomes vanilla Eagle Eyed.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_fastreader: At spawn becomes vanilla Fast Reader.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_firstaid: At spawn becomes vanilla First Aid (+1 Doctor).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_formerscout: At spawn becomes vanilla Former Scout.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_gardener: At spawn becomes vanilla Gardener (Farming +1, crop recipes).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_generatorexp: At spawn becomes SOTO Generator Expert.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_gymnast: At spawn becomes vanilla Gymnast (Lightfoot +1, Nimble +1).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_keenhearing: At spawn becomes vanilla Keen Hearing.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_nightvision: At spawn becomes vanilla Night Vision.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_outdoorsman: At spawn becomes vanilla Outdoorsman (+forage bonus).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_pacifist: At spawn becomes vanilla Pacifist (-25% combat XP).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_slaughterer: At spawn becomes SOTO Slaughterer trait.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_speeddemon: At spawn becomes vanilla Speed Demon.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_swap_strongback: At spawn becomes SOTO Strong Back.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_taut_1: Grants Strength +1 and Fitness +1 at character creation.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_taut_2: Trait removed after spawn — only XP boost remains.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_thickblood: Bleeding heals ~50% faster (0.00228 HP/tick per part).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_tireless: 20% chance to restore 50% swing endurance cost; faster arm stiffness recovery.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_truckdriver: Mechanics +1, Maintenance +1, Commercial Driver; vehicle mechanics recipes.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_underweight_rewor: [SOTO] Start weight 70; new description with Fast Metabolism.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_usedtocorpses: Corpse smell won't build nausea (1–20 food sickness); not zombification.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_veryunderweight_r: [SOTO] Start weight 60; new description with Fast Metabolism.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_weakback: Base carry weight 7; neck pain at Heavy Load 3–4.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_weightliftinginst: Strength +3, Fitness +1; Tireless, Strong Grip, Strong Back, Nutritionist.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_xp1: 角色创建时 %1 +1 经验加成。
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_weakback_detail: Strength 1,2,3,5: -1 carry; Strength 4,6,7,8,9: -2 carry; Strength 10: -3 carry.
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_breathing_vehicle: x3 endurance regen while sitting or in a vehicle (SOTO).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_marathonrunner_sc: Effect scales with Fitness; weaker if Overweight/Obese (SOTO).
UI_trait_moredesc_soto_pacifist_sandbox: Removable over time if SOTO sandbox PacifistRemovable is enabled.
